name: Batashey Gungun
overview: Love, obsession, and deception collide when Pallabi’s desire for Arindam, her married professor, spirals out of control. As her obsession deepens, Arindam fights to save his marriage to Mithila. But when emotions turn explosive, no one escapes the storm unharmed.
